lines: Once upon a time, there was a brave explorer named {player}...
Tell me, what happens next in our big adventure?
Every story needs a hero like you, {player}.
quest_offer_line: I've lost the middle of my favorite tale! Could you help me find it, {player}?
quest_progress_line: And then... and then...? You're doing so well, {player}!
quest_complete_line: What a wonderful ending! You're a brilliant storyteller, {player}.
